title: dischidia subulata subsp. angustata
intro: Dischidia subulata subsp. angustata, also known as the "Five-fingered Dischidia", is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dischidia subulata subsp. angustata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
